zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Goodale於1601年8月15日在英國素福爾可丹寧頓受洗時，他的父親Robert Goodale32歲，母親Joan Artys31歲。他於1628年10月22日與Katharine Kilham在英國英格蘭素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1682年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Goodale于1601年8月15日在英国素福爾可丹寧頓受洗时，他的父亲Robert Goodale32岁，母亲Joan Artys31岁。他于1628年10月22日与Katharine Kilham在英国英格兰素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1682年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Goodale was christened on 15 August 1601, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Goodale, was 32 and his mother, Joan Artys, was 31. He married Katharine Kilham on 22 October 1628, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 12 October 1682, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81.

Il a épousé Katharine Kilham le 22 octobre 1628, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1682, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Goodale è stato battezzato il 15 agosto 1601 nel Dennington, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Goodale, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan Artys, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Katharine Kilham il 22 ottobre 1628, nel Dennington, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 12 ottobre 1682, nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Goodale(이)가 1601년 8월 15일 영국 수폴크 데닝턴에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Goodale(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Artys(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1628년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Katharine Kilham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1682년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Goodale foi batizado em 15 de agosto de 1601, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Goodale, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Artys, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharine Kilham em 22 de outubro de 1628, em Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1682, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Goodale был крещен 15 августа 1601 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Goodale было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Artys, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharine Kilham 22 октября 1628 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 12 октября 1682 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год.

Se casó con Katharine Kilham el 22 de octubre de 1628, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
